description: Critical configurations that MUST NOT drift. Auto-heal check #12 validates each one nightly. Drift = needs-Ken US filed immediately. Update this baseline ONLY through explicit Ken-approved decision logged in decisions.md.
lastApprovalContext: CHG-0306: Baseline updated to reflect CHG-0270 model format change ({primary, fallbacks} object), CHG-0270 kimi safety net (3-level fallback), CHG-0228 governance agents to Haiku. All jq_queries updated to query .model.primary. Duplicate kimi in defaults fallbacks cleaned. Ken approved 2026-05-14 09:38 AEST.

checks.name: Agent main model primary is Sonnet (per US11 model strategy)
checks.rationale: US11 model strategy: Sonnet is default for all standard tasks. Opus is reserved for high-stakes/2x-failed/Legal Agent only. Drift to Opus = ~3x cost burn. Detected 2026-04-27 07:32 AEST after silent drift caused Day 3 to run on Opus. CHG-0270: model is now {primary, fallbacks} object.

checks.name: Default primary model is Haiku (conservative cost-safe default)
checks.rationale: CHG-0270: agents.defaults.model is now {primary, fallbacks} object. Default primary is Haiku — conservative cost-safe baseline for any agent without an explicit override. All primary agents (Yoda, Aria, Atlas, Thrawn, etc.) set their own Sonnet primary explicitly. Default Haiku prevents silent cost escalation from new/unconfigured agents.

checks.name: Default fallback chain includes kimi safety net (CHG-0270)
checks.rationale: CHG-0270 kimi safety net: every agent must have kimi as final fallback. Defaults fallbacks = [kimi]. Individual agents may have longer chains (sonnet->haiku->kimi). Minimum: at least one fallback (kimi). Zero fallbacks = platform dark on Anthropic outage.

checks.name: Main agent fallback chain: Sonnet -> Haiku -> Kimi (3 levels)
checks.rationale: CHG-0270: main agent must have 3-level chain: primary=Sonnet, fallback[0]=Haiku, fallback[1]=kimi. Kimi is the Anthropic-independent final safety net (incident 2026-05-13: key expiry took down platform).

checks.name: Ollama apiKey resolved (not placeholder)
checks.rationale: Hardened on 2026-04-27 (CHG-0003) after night-2 outage. Placeholder string OLLAMA_API_KEY caused fallback failure when Anthropic billing failed.

checks.name: Ollama auth-profiles entry present
checks.rationale: Belt-and-braces with config-004. Both auth layers must declare ollama-local for fallback chain to survive.
checks.fix_command: edit ~/.openclaw/agents/main/agent/auth-profiles.json: add profiles.ollama:default with provider=ollama and key=ollama-local

checks.name: Anthropic auth-profiles entry present
checks.rationale: Without this, primary + Haiku fallback both fail. Whole platform stops. Key rotation SOP: run propagate-anthropic-key.sh after any key change.
checks.fix_command: openclaw agents auth (Ken-only), then run scripts/propagate-anthropic-key.sh

checks.name: Workspace path consistent
checks.rationale: Drift here breaks all relative-path scripts and memory recall.

checks.name: Aria (business agent) model primary is Sonnet
checks.rationale: Option C decision 2026-04-27 21:18 AEST: Gemma4 cold-load (26B params) caused 30-60s freezes on every Aria Telegram response. Sonnet is always-on cloud — no cold-load, no RAM spike. Gemma4 remains available for background crons only. CHG-0270: .model.primary not .model.

checks.name: No Opus in default fallback chain
checks.rationale: CHG-0075: Aria prohibits Opus. Since fallbacks are global defaults, defaults must not include Opus. Check ensures Opus is absent from fallbacks array.

checks.name: Shield (security agent) model primary is Haiku
checks.rationale: Pre-OC2 cost strategy: governance agents run Haiku. Ken approved 2026-05-08 (CHG-0228). Will move to Gemma4 local post-OC2 (TRIGGER-03). CHG-0270: .model.primary not .model.

checks.name: Lex (legal agent) model primary is Haiku
checks.rationale: Pre-OC2 cost strategy: governance agents run Haiku. Ken approved 2026-05-08 (CHG-0228). Will move to Gemma4 local post-OC2 (TRIGGER-03). CHG-0270: .model.primary not .model.

checks.name: Sage (qa agent) model primary is Haiku
checks.rationale: Pre-OC2 cost strategy: governance agents run Haiku. Ken approved 2026-05-08 (CHG-0228). Will move to Gemma4 local post-OC2 (TRIGGER-03). CHG-0270: .model.primary not .model.

checks.name: Warden (governance agent) model primary is Haiku
checks.rationale: CHG-0228: Warden moved to Haiku (pre-OC2 cost strategy, lightweight compliance monitor). Was Sonnet — updated 2026-05-08. Will move to Gemma4 local post-OC2 (TRIGGER-03). CHG-0270: .model.primary not .model.

checks.name: Haiku 4.5 registered in openclaw.json models (Tier 2)
checks.rationale: Haiku 4.5 is Tier 2 model (3x cheaper than Sonnet). Must be registered for cron routing. TKT-0014.

checks.name: No agent has model=null in openclaw.json
checks.rationale: All agents must have explicit model config. null model = falls through to defaults which may not be appropriate for the agent's workload.
checks.fix_command: Set explicit model on all agents in openclaw.json. Run: jq .agents.list[].id ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json

checks.name: gemma4:31b-cloud in globalAllowedModels
checks.fix_command: Update model-policy.json: add ollama/gemma4:31b-cloud to globalAllowedModels
checks.rationale: CHG-0356: gemma4:31b-cloud approved as T2 Ollama Cloud model (replaces 26b local)
